scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix edumind-ai" "cd edumind-ai-backend && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 --host 127.0.0.1"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix edumind-ai && npm run build --prefix edumind-ai
